meaning: 乞拉朋齐[印度东北部一村庄]
examples: Shrouded in clouds and surrounded by waterfalls, Cherrapunji is one of the wettest places on Earth.
Cherrapunji, India, 1,290 meters above sea level, receives the most largest annual rainfall in the world.
